use_cases: Displaying cryptocurrency staking yield rates in DeFi applications
Showing investment returns on fintech dashboards
Presenting savings account interest rates with premium styling
Featuring yield farming returns in crypto portfolio trackers
Highlighting interest earnings in neo-banking interfaces
ai_summary: A premium dark-themed card component designed for displaying financial yield and interest rate information. Features a sophisticated gradient border with gold accents, large rounded corners, and a gradient-filled SVG icon. Built for fintech and DeFi applications where presenting investment returns in a visually compelling way is essential. The component uses a luxurious color scheme with yellow (#FFEE24, #afa220) accents against deep black and charcoal backgrounds, making it ideal for crypto and wealth management interfaces.
